title: Allowed repeated matmul
command: cd test && VIRTUAL_ENV=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv PATH=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv/bin:$PATH PYTHONPATH=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages make clean && VIRTUAL_ENV=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv PATH=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv/bin:$PATH PYTHONPATH=/tmp/rlhdl-gradient/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages make && ! grep failure results.xml
phase_a_result: FAIL: base+test assertion C[0][0] = 97 != expected 111; second run observed 97,134,129,162 vs expected 111,122,151,166
phase_b_result: PASS: gold observed 111,122,151,166; TESTS=1 PASS=1 FAIL=0 SKIP=0
modal_result: VERIFIED: base original passed, base+test failed with C[0][0] = 97 != expected 111, gold passed with 111,122,151,166
notes: Best immediate TPU/systolic-array verified gradient. Original base tests pass; new repeated-matmul test exposes missing accumulator clear. Converted into native rl-hdl clocked task.

title: hw/cp: engine retires on resource done, not on arbiter grant
command: ./configure --tooldir=/opt/vortex-tools --osversion=ubuntu/focal && make -C hw/unittest/cp_engine clean && make -C hw/unittest/cp_engine -j2 && timeout 120s make -C hw/unittest/cp_engine run
phase_a_result: FAIL build: test-only top references new kmu_done_i/dma_done_i/dcr_done_i pins absent from base VX_cp_engine
phase_b_result: PASS: gold cp_engine unit builds and runs under Verilator
notes: Countable Vortex verified gradient, but lower quality than behavioral TPU cases because the failing signal is an interface/build mismatch.

title: minor int fedp fix
command: ./configure --tooldir=/opt/vortex-tools --osversion=ubuntu/focal && make -C hw config && make -C third_party softfloat -j2 && make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_TYPE_DRL -DXLEN=32' -j2 && timeout 120s make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_TYPE_DRL -DXLEN=32' OPTS='--fmt=8 --tests=5000 --sparsity=50' run
phase_a_result: PASS: base+test runs successfully after generated-config prep
phase_b_result: PASS: gold runs successfully
notes: TCU/FEDP path is runnable with free Verilator+SoftFloat, but this candidate is not a gradient.

title: fixed DRL accumulator bug
command: ./configure --tooldir=/opt/vortex-tools --osversion=ubuntu/focal && make -C hw config && make -C third_party softfloat -j2 && make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_DRL -DXLEN=32' -j2 && timeout 120s make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_DRL -DXLEN=32' OPTS='--fmt=1 --tests=5000' run

phase_b_result: FAIL runtime: gold still fails on same infinities class under this free Verilator command

title: tfr fp8 fix
command: ./configure --tooldir=/opt/vortex-tools --osversion=ubuntu/focal && make -C hw config && make -C third_party softfloat -j2 && make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_TYPE_TFR -DXLEN=32' -j2 && timeout 120s make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_TYPE_TFR -DXLEN=32' OPTS='--fmt=3 --tests=5000' run

phase_b_result: FAIL runtime: gold builds but FP8 test still fails on ULP mismatch under tried commands
notes: TFR/FP8 unit is runnable, but gold does not pass cleanly with the tested free Verilator command.

title: fixed FEDP unitest
command: ./configure --tooldir=/opt/vortex-tools --osversion=ubuntu/focal && make -C hw config && make -C third_party softfloat -j2 && make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_BHF -DXLEN=32' LATENCY=13 -j2 && timeout 120s make -C hw/unittest/tcu_fedp CONFIGS='-DTCU_BHF -DXLEN=32' LATENCY=13 OPTS='--fmt=3 --tests=5000' run
phase_a_result: PASS: base+test passes once LATENCY=13 matches the BHF backend
phase_b_result: PASS: gold passes
notes: BHF/HardFloat path is runnable with free tools, but this candidate is not a gradient.
